step_rationale: Classical complement initiator; activates cascade driving thrombus formation and ACS severity.
mechanism: C1q initiates classical complement activation driving thrombus formation and myocardial injury in acute MI.

references.title: Serum complement C1q level is associated with acute coronary syndrome.
Use of dextran sulfate in tourniquet-induced skeletal muscle reperfusion injury.
Local complement activation triggers neutrophil recruitment to the site of thrombus formation in acute myocardial infarction.
